name: 32" Stack Stone Wood Burning Outdoor Fireplace with Spark Screen - Threshold™: Heat-Resistant Steel, Round Shape
description:
Make the most of your outdoor space with this Stack Stone Wood Burning Fireplace with Spark Screen from Threshold™. Made from heat- and weather-resistant steel, this outdoor fireplace features a simple round shape in a black finish to easily pair with any outdoor aesthetic. Plus, the spark screen cover keeps the embers from flying all over the place. Whether you're enjoying some time alone or entertaining guests, this wood burning fireplace will instantly create a cozy and comfortable atmosphere.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
